story.title: The state of open source AI

draft:
I've been exploring the state of open source AI and it's clear that community-driven projects are driving innovation. 
Key areas of growth include natural language processing and computer vision. 
I'm interested in seeing how these advancements will be applied in real-world scenarios. 
What role do you think open source AI will play in shaping the future of tech?
#opensourceAI #AIinnovation #techtrends
